name: mj-music-skill
description: Michael Jackson mood companion and play-entry skill

interface.shortDescription: Read the mood, recommend the right Michael Jackson song, and open it fast
interface.longDescription: Use MJ Music Skill as a Michael Jackson mood companion: it reads how you feel, responds with a brief emotionally aware line, recommends songs for that moment, and opens the selected track with local playback helpers.
interface.defaultPrompt: I'm tired. Give me the right Michael Jackson song for this mood, or open a specific MJ track.
